# localstorage-platform

> Type-safe browser storage for production apps, with namespaces, metadata, TTL, optional encryption, and group-based cleanup.

Documentation: https://localstorage-platform-docs.vercel.app
Getting started: https://localstorage-platform-docs.vercel.app/docs/getting-started
API reference: https://localstorage-platform-docs.vercel.app/docs/api
Repository: https://github.com/captainAmerica700/localstorage-platform

## Core Topics

- Namespace isolation for browser storage keys
- Metadata stored alongside every value
- Automatic TTL expiration
- Optional AES encryption for selected values
- Group-based cleanup for related records
- Framework-agnostic TypeScript API

## Package

Install with pnpm:

```bash
pnpm add localstorage-platform
```

Install with npm:

```bash
npm install localstorage-platform
```
